title: Part-Time Taxi Driver
description: Drive passengers safely around Miami in our Camry sedans and Pacifica vans. Clean driving record required, valid Florida license, CDL a plus. Flexible shifts.

title: Fleet Mechanic
description: Maintain and repair our 12-vehicle fleet of Toyota Camry sedans and Chrysler Pacifica vans. Handle preventive maintenance, inspections, and roadside repairs at our Allapattah yard.

title: Dispatcher
description: Coordinate driver assignments, manage airport and hotel pickup schedules, and keep our riders moving on time. Calm under pressure and great on the radio and phone.

title: Non-Emergency Medical Transport Driver
description: Transport patients safely to and from medical appointments. Assist riders with mobility needs, follow safety protocols, and provide courteous, dependable service.

title: Customer Service & Booking Agent
description: Take ride reservations by phone and online, answer rider questions, and coordinate with dispatch to confirm pickups for our airport, hotel, and medical-transport customers.

title: Fleet Operations Coordinator
description: Coordinate daily fleet operations, driver schedules, vehicle maintenance tracking, and our hotel, airport, and hospital shuttle contracts at the Allapattah yard.
